_meta.description: Starter structure for mapping product-line naming variants in the Oil Painting Research Assistant. This file is intentionally lighter than material_alias_map.json. It defines the canonical pattern for product family mapping and contains a starter set. It will grow as manufacturer TDS documents are ingested.
_meta.growth_note: Add entries as manufacturer sources are ingested. Do not invent product-specific data not present in ingested TDS or catalog sources.

product_families.notes: Professional-grade line. Distinguishable from Winsor & Newton Winton (student grade).
Student-grade line. Must not be conflated with Artists' Oil in product comparison contexts.
High oil-to-pigment ratio line. Properties may differ substantially from other brands carrying same pigment code.
Professional line from Gamblin. Known for conservation-conscious formulations.
Student-grade line. Must not be conflated with Gamblin Artist's Oil in product comparison contexts.
Hand-ground line. High pigment load. Properties may differ from machine-ground paints.
Natural Pigments brand. Focus on historical pigments and oil types.
High pigment concentration. Handmade in UK.
